home.headline: Ourika Camp
home.subtitle: A warm retreat at the gates of Marrakech, where elegance and authenticity meet for an unforgettable experience

roomsPage.title: Our Rooms
roomsPage.intro: Discover our selection of rooms and suites, each designed to reflect the charm of Marrakech with modern comfort.

double.title: Standard Double Room
double.desc: This spacious double room features air conditioning, a private entrance, and a private bathroom with a shower and hairdryer. The room offers soundproof walls, a wardrobe, tiled floors, heating, and a flat-screen TV. Includes 1 bed.

familySuite.title: Family Suite
familySuite.desc: In the well-equipped kitchen, guests will find a stove, refrigerator, kitchenware, and a tea/coffee kettle. The spacious family living room offers air conditioning, a private entrance, a garden-view terrace, and a private bathroom with a shower. The apartment has 3 beds.

juniorSuite.title: Junior Suite with Mountain View
juniorSuite.desc: Featuring a private entrance, this air-conditioned suite includes a living room, a separate bedroom, and a bathroom with a shower. Offering a garden-view terrace, it also has soundproof walls and a flat-screen TV. Includes 1 bed.

triplePool.title: Triple Room with Pool View
triplePool.desc: This spacious triple room offers air conditioning, a private entrance, a pool-view balcony, and a private bathroom with a shower. Includes 2 beds.

roomsHome.heading: Rooms & Suites
roomsHome.sub: Handcrafted details, calm courtyards, and crisp linens. Choose your perfect retreat.

reviews.heading: Guest Reviews
reviews.sub: Real impressions from our recent guests.

items.text: Many thanks for the excellent Service to the hotel. I particularly appreciated the professionalism and kindness of M. Youssef and Abdellatif, which made my stay even more enjoyable. Bravo and keep going🥰.

Excellent experience.I was there with friends a few weeks ago to rest, we were not disappointed!Warm and welcoming staff, quality and affordable food, large pool and more generally very charming hotel.

Very good atmosphere. Quality dishes and you can swim in peace in a beautiful pool listening to good music. To do with family or even friends. There are even activities for children (ping pong, basketball...)

booking.invalid: Please choose a check-out date after check-in.

location.heading: A peaceful haven at the city's doorstep
location.desc: Ourika Camp keeps you close to the buzzing souks and historic medina while offering the elegance and calm of an exclusive retreat.
points: A peaceful haven close to the city's must-see attractions
At the gateway to the Ourika Valley and the Atlas Mountains — perfect for unforgettable getaways
Spacious rooms combining modern comfort with authentic charm
